ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the observation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the observation */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object being observed */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the satellite that made the observation */,
  "observation_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of observation */,
  "observed_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was made */,
  "processed_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was processed */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note associated with the observation */,
  "observation_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the observation */,
  "observation_status" TEXT /* Status of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_type_id") REFERENCES observation_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the object */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the satellite associated with the object */,
  "last_observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last observation of the object */,
  "next_scheduled_observation" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled observation */,
  "observation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the object is observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the satellite */,
  "mission" TEXT /* Mission of the satellite */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the satellite */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the observation type */,
  "min_resolution" REAL /* Minimum resolution required for this observation type */,
  "max_resolution" REAL /* Maximum resolution allowed for this observation type */,
  "processing_time" INTEGER /* Average time required to process this type of observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "processing_time" INTEGER /* Average time required to complete this process */,
  "required_resources" TEXT /* Resources required to execute this process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_processes" (
  "obs_process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation-process link */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process applied */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the process */,
  "result_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the result after the process is applied */,
  "result_file" TEXT /* File path to the result of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_processes_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_processes_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the metadata is associated with */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)
